title: Lite Dagger
description: Just a dagger, nothing out of the ordinary.
body: My friend made a cool model of a dagger that I turned into a mod. There is this dagger in fashion and that's it. The dagger is cool because it has damage like a golden sword but a very small cooldown. And that's not all, because despite such an imbue, it is balanced by the fact that it doesn't have much strength. By the way, I made this mod in exactly 5 minutes!
